abort.already_configured: This speaker is already configured. Its network address has been updated.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the device. Make sure the speaker is powered on and reachable on your local network, then try again.

data_description.host: The IP address or hostname of your ADAM Audio speaker.
data_description.port: The UDP port of your ADAM Audio speaker.

user.description: Enter the IP address of your ADAM Audio A-Series speaker. If you don't know the port, leave it at the default ({default_port}).
user.title: Add ADAM Audio speaker

zeroconf_confirm.description: Found **{name}** at `{host}`. Do you want to add it to Home Assistant?
zeroconf_confirm.title: ADAM Audio speaker found
